articles.title: A new wave of the Serperior the Unrivaled 7★ Tera Raid Battle event is live!
articles.snippet: This Tera Raid Battle event lasts until 9 April. Serperior the Unrivaled was last featured in September 2024, so take this chance to catch it if you didn't back then!

articles.title: Obtain an alpha Chikorita, an alpha Tepig and an alpha Totodile in Pokémon HOME!
articles.snippet: Obtain an Alpha Chikorita, an Alpha Tepig and an Alpha Totodile in the Pokémon HOME mobile app after connecting it to Pokémon Legends: Z-A!

articles.title: Pokémon HOME version 4.0.0 is live!
articles.snippet: This update to both the Nintendo Switch and the mobile apps adds connectivity to Pokémon Legends: Z-A and prepares it for Pokémon Champions ahead of its release, and enables Latin American Spanish as…

articles.title: Sign-ups for the Indianapolis Regional are open!
articles.snippet: All you need to know about the 2026 Indianapolis Regional Championships, the first major event in North America to be played with Pokémon Champions, held on 30–31 May 2026!

articles.title: Teams, results and all info from the 2026 Cape Town Special Championships!
articles.snippet: German player Hermann Krumrey has won his first major title! Hermann defeated South African player Chad Hull in the finals of the Cape Town Special Championships.

articles.title: Pokemon Presents February 2026
articles.snippet: Tune in for exciting Pokemon news and announcements.

articles.snippet: The latest Pokemon TCG expansion featuring Shiny Pokemon is now available at retailers.

articles.title: Pokemon TCG: Prismatic Evolutions Announced
